title: Mellow Kenyan Molasses Sweet Potato Wrap
description: A traditional Kenyan dish featuring sweet potatoes, molasses, and lotus leaf wrap, macrobiotic-friendly and perfect for a cozy meal. The bitter and fluffy texture of the sweet potatoes pairs well with the sweetness of the molasses.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sweet potatoes with coconut oil, onion, ginger, turmeric, and salt until they are well coated.
Wrap each sweet potato piece in a lotus leaf and place them in a steamer basket.
Steam the sweet potatoes for 20 minutes or until they are tender.
In a small saucepan, heat the molasses over low heat until it is warm and runny.
To assemble the wraps, place a steamed sweet potato piece on a lotus leaf, drizzle with molasses, and fold the leaf to enclose.
Serve the wraps warm and enjoy.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
